The G strips seem to be "connectors" or "separators" between elements. I've tried clicking on the G strip to the left of the green bar (no_impact) and the G strip between green containers (no_impact). Let me try the G strip above the yellow bar (row 27, col 10).
Actually, wait. Let me reconsider the problem entirely. Maybe the goal is not to shrink the bars but to do something else. What if the goal is to click on the G strip between the yellow containers (row 41, col 24)?
Looking at the ascii, row 41 has "gGGGGGg" which is the G strip between the two yellow containers. This is similar to the G strip between the green containers (row 21, col 42), which I already tried and was no_impact.
Actually, let me try clicking on the green bar itself (not the red dot). The green bar is at rows 9-11, cols 28-32. The red dot is at [10, 31]. So I could click on [10, 28] or [10, 30] or [10, 32].

Let me try the G strip above the yellow bar (row 27, col 10). This is the only G strip I haven't tried yet.
